item.title: A Watch Found on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares a watch find, showing how small objects can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Watch Found on the Thames Foreshore
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares a watch find, showing how small objects can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: 7 Mudlarking Finds to Remember
item.description: Nicola White shares seven memorable mudlarking finds from the Thames foreshore, exploring the history and stories behind each object. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: 7 Mudlarking Finds to Remember
media:content.media:description: Nicola White shares seven memorable mudlarking finds from the Thames foreshore, exploring the history and stories behind each object. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Finds Along the Shoreline
item.description: Exploring historical finds along the River Thames shoreline. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Finds Along the Shoreline
media:content.media:description: Exploring historical finds along the River Thames shoreline. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Beautiful 19th Century Pipe Discovery
item.description: A look at a 19th-century pipe found on the Thames foreshore, offering a glimpse into everyday life and river history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.description: Nicola White explores historical artefacts along the River Thames, uncovering everyday objects and their stories. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Finding a Centuries-Old Smoking Pipe
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a centuries-old smoking pipe, revealing a small object with a story from the river’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a centuries-old smoking pipe, revealing a small object with a story from the river’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.description: Nicola White explores a 1720s find from the Thames foreshore, uncovering its history and the story it may tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Strange Thames Ruler: What Did It Measure?
item.description: Nicola White explores a strange ruler found in the Thames and considers what it may have measured. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a strange ruler found in the Thames and considers what it may have measured. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
